full_text: Ali Khan to Fakhar Zaman, Caught by Steven Taylor!! It gets better for USA. Ali Khan is off on a celebratory run. He has picked up a massive wicket here. This was premeditated by Fakhar and he pays the price. Back of a length delivery and at the stumps, Fakhar shuffled inside the line to play the lap and gets hit on the glove, the ball lobs to short fine and it is a simpler catch for Taylor this time. USA are cock-a-hoop.

full_text: Ali Khan to Babar Azam, leg byes, 1 run, where was Babar going? Good length ball and nips in, Babar is beaten on the flick and struck high on the pad. Ali Khan went up for the LBW appeal but it was high and hence umpire was not interested. Babar, meanwhile, wanted a single and was halfway down without seeing where the ball went and Fakhar did not respond, the fielder from backward point has a shy and fails to hit the stumps at the striker's end. The pair eventually get the single as there was no one backing up

full_text: Netravalkar to Rizwan, Caught by Steven Taylor!! Wow! That is a stunner from Taylor and the whole USA team run up to him. The crowd are delighted with that piece of fielding. Good length ball and it swings away late, Rizwan is rooted to the crease and is squared up because of the movement, gets an outside edge and the ball was dying on the lone slip fielder, Taylor dives to his right and scoops it with one hand before it hits the ground.
